title: Adjust year of the fiscal year (and not just the month)
excerpt:
Thanks for releasing the possibility to adjust the month to start the fiscal year in gantt charts!

posts.author: gvanderwerken (Gerrit Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for releasing the possibility to adjust the month to start the fiscal year in gantt charts!
I see that you have chosen not to adopt the common identification of a fiscal year: “The identification of a fiscal year is the calendar year in which it ends;” . I.e. our fiscal year starts in February and we call May 2024: “May FY2025” and not “FY2024” like is implemented now.
Can you please fix this or maybe add the option to select the fiscal year and not just the month?
Thank you!
